subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! Say: My God, my God, O Gracious, O Merciful One! This is my vision before Thy countenance, and from Thee it doth beseech [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود بگو الهی الهی کریما رحیما اینست بصر من امام وجه تو و از تو میطلبد
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for forgiveness
